hooks.command: prompt=$(cat | grep -o '"prompt":"[^"]*"' | sed 's/"prompt":"//;s/"$//'); echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE 'зроби +коміт|закомі[тч]|\bcommit\b' && touch /tmp/commit-approved; exit 0

cmd=$(cat | grep -o '"command":"[^"]*"' | sed 's/"command":"//;s/"$//'); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit' && { if [ -f /tmp/commit-approved ] && [ -z "$(find /tmp/commit-approved -mmin +5 2>/dev/null)" ]; then rm -f /tmp/commit-approved; exit 0; else echo 'git commit BLOCKED — say "зроби коміт" first' >&2; exit 2; fi; } || exit 0

file=$(cat | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"$//'); echo "$file" | grep -qE -- '-spring-boot-starter/.*/db/.*changelog' || exit 0; starter=$(echo "$file" | grep -oE '[a-z-]+-spring-boot-starter' | head -1); echo "Reminder: $file is a Liquibase changelog edit -- check that $starter/CLAUDE.md's Schema/Tables section still matches before committing." >&2; exit 0

file=$(cat | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"$//'); echo "$file" | grep -qE -- '-spring-boot-starter/.*/db/.*changelog' || exit 0; starter=$(echo "$file" | grep -oE '[a-z-]+-spring-boot-starter' | head -1); echo "Reminder: $file is a Liquibase changelog edit -- check that $starter/CLAUDE.md's Schema/Tables section still matches before committing." >&2; exit 0
